meta.name: Mateo Developmental Milestones
meta.source: WHO Multicentre Growth Reference Study — Windows of Achievement for six gross-motor milestones (Acta Paediatrica, 2006), plus general IAP/CDC developmental guidance for social & language milestones.
meta.notes: Windows are months after birth (1st–99th percentile of achievement age for the WHO motor milestones; typical ranges for the general ones). Every baby develops at their own pace — these are typical ranges, NOT a test or a diagnosis. Only flag (gently) when a window is fully exceeded.

milestones.label: Social smile
milestones.description: Smiles back at you on purpose

milestones.label: Rolls over
milestones.description: Rolls from tummy to back and back to tummy

milestones.label: Sits without support
milestones.description: Sits steadily without using hands to prop up

milestones.label: Babbles & responds to name
milestones.description: Makes repeated sounds (ba-ba, da-da) and turns to their name

milestones.label: Crawls on hands & knees
milestones.description: Moves forward on hands and knees

milestones.label: Stands alone
milestones.description: Stands without holding on, even briefly

milestones.label: Says first words
milestones.description: Says a few meaningful words like "mama" or "dada"
